task_completion.description: Verify that the Odoo application is accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo web interface is visible on the screen (either the login screen, dashboard, or Employees app).

task_completion.description: Verify that the employee profile for 'Anita Oliver' is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo employee profile page for 'Anita Oliver' is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Badge ID is set to 'AO-9942'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value 'AO-9942' is entered in the Badge ID field (often located under the 'HR Settings' tab in the Odoo employee profile).

task_completion.description: Verify that the profile photo is updated or an attempt is made to upload the specified file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The profile photo for Anita Oliver is changed, or a file picker dialog is open showing the selection of '/home/ga/Documents/anita_profile.png'. Note: The image file may be broken or missing, so a broken image icon or the file picker selection is acceptable.

task_completion.description: Verify that the profile changes are saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The profile is in a saved state (e.g., an 'Edit' button is visible instead of 'Save', or a confirmation message is shown) with the updated Badge ID and/or photo visible.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Odoo graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The changes are made through the Odoo web interface in a browser, not via terminal commands, Python scripts, or direct database manipulation.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface is clearly the Odoo web application, not a text editor, mock HTML page, or notes app.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target employee is 'Anita Oliver'. The target Badge ID is 'AO-9942' (this corresponds to the 'barcode' field in Odoo, typically labeled 'Badge ID' under the HR Settings tab). The profile photo to upload is '/home/ga/Documents/anita_profile.png'. Note: Due to a known setup issue, the image file might be missing or broken. Accept evidence of the agent attempting to select this file in the file picker or uploading a broken image icon.
